title: astragalus pisidicus
intro: Astragalus pisidius is a plant species, also known as Caltrop or Pisidium, belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus pisidius include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is also dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
